patches.summary: Fix issue sync to use /rest/api/3/search/jql; add --project flag for scoped sync; make issue_changelog, issue_comment, issue_worklog opt-in.
patches.reason: Generator picked wrong list endpoint; JQL endpoint needs maxResults/nextPageToken; per-issue child resources generate N API calls per issue so must be explicit.

patches.summary: Add HTTP Basic auth (JIRA_API_TOKEN + JIRA_EMAIL env vars).
patches.reason: Generator emitted OAuth2-only; Jira Cloud developer auth is HTTP Basic with email:token.

patches.summary: Fix live search to use /rest/api/3/search/jql; add --project flag to local FTS search.
patches.reason: Old /rest/api/3/search returns 410; issue table has no FTS index so SearchIssue uses json_extract LIKE.

patches.summary: Qualify ORDER BY rank as ORDER BY <table>_fts.rank in all FTS queries.
patches.reason: dashboard table has a rank column that clashes with FTS5 rank pseudo-column.

patches.summary: Remove duplicate bodyLeadAccountId var and lead-account-id flag in component create/update.
patches.reason: Generator emitted the same variable and flag twice causing a runtime panic on --help.

patches.summary: Add cycle-time, workload, blocked, stale (Jira-specific), worklog-summary; fix blocked empty-message; cycle-time --last accepts duration strings.
patches.reason: Hand-authored analytics not produced by generator.
